payment.title: Payment
payment.description: Collect and reconcile payments. Connect Stripe in Integrations when payment processing is enabled for your organization.

payroll.title: Payroll
payroll.description: View salary slips and tax details. Data comes from your organization's ERP payroll module.

reservation.title: Reservation
reservation.description: Book rooms, appointments, and resources. Reservation integrations will appear here as they roll out.

accounting.title: Accounting
accounting.description: General ledger and accounting workflows. Frappe ERP is the default backend; connect Xero or Odoo in Integrations to use an external provider.

financial_reports.title: Financial Reports
financial_reports.description: Company P&L, balance sheet, and trial balance. Requires company financials access on Account.
